# statsguider

Simple statistical test selection from a `data.frame`.

`statsguider` helps you choose a statistical method by branching on data
properties, then run the recommended method.

## Install

``` r
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("dai540/statsguider")
library(statsguider)
```

## Fastest way to use it

``` r
dat <- subset(wet_example, visit == "week4")

select_test(
  data = dat,
  outcome = "biomarker",
  group = "group",
  outcome_type = "continuous",
  paired = "no",
  repeated = "no",
  run = "run"
)
```

## Learn by scenarios

- English
  - [Start
    here](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/articles/en-start.md)
  - [Choose by
    branching](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/articles/en-branching.md)
  - [Scenario
    tutorials](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/articles/en-examples.md)
  - [Main
    functions](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/articles/en-functions.md)
- 日本語
  - [はじめに](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/articles/ja-start.md)
  - [分岐で選ぶ](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/articles/ja-branching.md)
  - [シナリオ別チュートリアル](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/articles/ja-examples.md)
  - [主な関数](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/articles/ja-functions.md)

## What the tutorial pages do

- English
  - each tutorial creates a small data table
  - each tutorial applies
    [`select_test()`](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/reference/select_test.md)
    or
    [`run_test()`](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/reference/run_test.md)
  - each scenario shows how to set the branching arguments
- 日本語
  - 各チュートリアルで小さなデータ表を自分で作ります
  - そのデータ表に
    [`select_test()`](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/reference/select_test.md)
    や
    [`run_test()`](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/reference/run_test.md)
    を適用します
  - 分岐に必要な引数をどう設定するかも一緒に示します

# Package index

## Main functions

- [`select_test()`](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/reference/select_test.md)
  : Select and Optionally Run a Statistical Test
- [`guided_test()`](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/reference/guided_test.md)
  : Guide a User Through Simple Test Selection
- [`recommend_test()`](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/reference/recommend_test.md)
  : Recommend a Statistical Test from Simple Data Properties
- [`run_test()`](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/reference/run_test.md)
  : Run a Recommended Statistical Test
- [`check_design()`](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/reference/check_design.md)
  : Check Whether a Design Fits the Simple Branching Workflow

## Example data

- [`wet_example`](https://dai540.github.io/statsguider/reference/wet_example.md)
  : Example Wet-Lab Style Dataset
